title: arete #0703
definition:
1) a virtuous course of thought, feeling and action
    1a) virtue, moral goodness
 2) any particular moral excellence, as modesty, purity
nasbUsage:

    1a) virtue, moral goodness
 2) any particular moral excellence, as modesty, purity

    NASB:  moral goodness, i.e. virtue:
